name: Lime & Cranberry
description: A refreshing two-ingredient highball that combines BACARDÍ Lime Flavoured rum with cranberry juice and a lime wedge garnish. Serve up the taste of summer year-round with a refreshing BACARDÍ Lime & Cranberry. It’s the tart flavour you crave, now with an irresistible twist of lime zest.
recipe_steps: Fill a highball glass with ice.
Pour ingredients into the highball glass.
searchable_text: Lime & Cranberry main rum BACARDÍ Lime Flavoured rum A refreshing two-ingredient highball that combines BACARDÍ Lime Flavoured rum with cranberry juice and a lime wedge garnish. Serve up the taste of summer year-round with a refreshing BACARDÍ Lime & Cranberry. It’s the tart flavour you crave, now with an irresistible twist of lime zest. ingredients 44 ml BACARDÍ Lime Flavoured rum, 89 ml cranberry juice, ice, lime wedge recipe steps Fill a highball glass with ice. Pour ingredients into the highball glass. Stir well to combine. Garnish with a lime wedge.
